findings.description: Image duplication and misordering of figures.
findings.evidence: The HTML rendering places the map for Figure 8 before Figure 7, and the map for Slender Naiad is displayed twice on the same page.

findings.description: Orphaned image caption breaking reading order.
findings.evidence: The caption for Figure 8 is placed alone at the top of the HTML page, separated from its corresponding header and map.

findings.description: Image duplication and misordering of figures.
findings.evidence: The HTML rendering places the map for Figure 10 before Figure 9, and the map for Brittle Naiad is displayed twice on the same page.

findings.description: Orphaned image caption breaking reading order.
findings.evidence: The caption for Figure 10 is placed alone at the top of the HTML page, separated from its corresponding header and map.
The header and map for Slender Pondweed (Figure 11) appearing at the top of the HTML page are exact duplicates of content rendered at the bottom of the previous page.
The header, map, and caption for Water Willow (Figure 12) appearing at the top of the HTML page are exact duplicates of the content rendered on the previous page.
